---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
subtitle: "Miel Hostens"
date: last-modified 
format:
  pdf:
    output-file: miel-hostens-short-cv.pdf
    documentclass: report
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
    geometry: margin=1in
    colorlinks: true
    papersize: letter
---

\newpage
{{< include sections/appointments.qmd >}}
\newpage
{{< include sections/research-focus.qmd >}}
\newpage
{{< include sections/output.qmd >}}
